snippet: Lasix is a common brand name for furosemide.
Prinivil and Zestril are common brand names for lisinopril.
Glucophage is a common brand name for metformin.
Lipitor is a common brand name for atorvastatin.
ProAir, Ventolin, and Proventil are common albuterol inhaler names.
Norvasc is a common brand name for amlodipine.
Prilosec is a common brand name for omeprazole.
Synthroid and Levoxyl are common brand names for levothyroxine.
Zoloft is a common brand name for sertraline.
Imitrex is a common brand name for sumatriptan.
Macrobid and Macrodantin are common names for nitrofurantoin.
HCTZ is a common abbreviation for hydrochlorothiazide.
